title: YeSvelte
description: A high-performance UI component library for Svelte based on Bootstrap.

content.overview: YeSvelte is an open-source UI library designed to provide Svelte developers with a comprehensive set of accessible and customizable components based on the Bootstrap framework.
content.challenge: Svelte developers often lack a robust, well-documented component library that follows Bootstrap's proven design patterns while leveraging Svelte's reactivity and performance.
content.solution: We built YeSvelte from the ground up, ensuring each component is highly performant, accessible, and easy to use. We also provided extensive documentation and examples to help developers get started quickly.
content.results: YeSvelte has gained significant traction in the Svelte community, with thousands of downloads and contributions from developers worldwide, simplifying the UI development process for many projects.
